channel.title: Ethernauts on Koyphshi
channel.description: Recent content in Ethernauts on Koyphshi

item.title: EllipticToken
item.description: our goal is to steal the tokens that Alice just redeemed by using the fact that Bob skipped parts of the ECDSA algorithm

item.title: Elevator
item.description: in this challenge our goal is to set top = True

item.title: Delegation
item.description: in this challenge we are given the code for 2 contracts and our goal is to claim ownership for the given contract instance

item.title: Force
item.description: in this challenge we are given this contract and our goal is to increase the balance of this contract, this might be weird because this contract is empty!

item.title: Gatekeeper One
item.description: in this challenge our goal is to pass the three gates we have

item.title: King
item.description: in this challenge we are given this contract and our goal is to not let the level reclaim kingship after we submit the instance

item.title: Magic Number
item.description: this challenge is about calling the setSolver function and we give it an address of a contract that responds to whatIsTheMeaningOfLife() with the number 42

item.title: Token
item.description: in this challenge we are given a simple token contract, we start with 20 tokens and our goal is to find a bug that allows us to get a large amount of tokens

item.title: Vault
item.description: we are given this contract instance and our task is to set locked to false
